creator: steve@cmpharm.ucsf.edu
text:
The laptop is an Acer Extensa 390.
I installed 2.2.6 from CDROM with PAO boot floppy. pccard is
recognized as ep0 when inserted, and seems to be properly configured.
pings to or from the machine (toots) take an average of 90000 ms,
with over 90% packet loss.

The exact same hardware works flawlessly with Windows 95, and this same
ethernet card works on two different laptops running Solaris.
